provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly item concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi equipment, visible material texture and surface detail, visible brushstrokes, centered item on plain dark grey background, studio lighting, perfectly polished chrome handgun with blue LED accents and holographic sight, pristine and new, looks like a luxury product advertisement, no wear or history

judgment.explanation: Perfectly polished chrome handgun with LED accents. Product advertisement, no wear or history, not a working weapon.

Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill

Reads as generic sci-fi — not faction-specific (10%)
